programme.desc: Held at Campo Marte in Mexico City, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The program includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, where riders earn ranking points toward the season standings. Competition takes place at altitude, impacting horse performance and pace.

programme.title: EN EPL Review 2025/26 | E37
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: Sevilla vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 37
programme.desc: Sevilla have failed to win any of their last 14 LaLiga matches against Real Madrid since a 3-0 victory in September 2018, and they could equal their longest winless streak against Los Blancos in the competition. Real Madrid have picked up points in each of their last six LaLiga visits to Sevilla, having lost six of the previous seven, and they cou

programme.title: Paris FC vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: This match will be the fifth meeting between Paris FC and Paris Saint-Germain in all competitions, with both sides having won one and drawn two of their previous four encounters. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last 26 Ligue 1 matches against newly promoted sides, with their last such defeat coming in January 2021 against Lorient.

programme.title: EN EPL Catch-Up Show 2025/26 Ep.40
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Sinals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. The final will be played on 30 May 2026 at Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: One Friday Fights - 155
Practice 1 - F1 Canada Grand Prix - 2026
programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. Practice gives the first real read on long-run pace and tyre wear, qualifying is a flat-out one-lap fight where track evolution matters, and the Grand Prix is 58 laps (306.124km) shaped by strategy, safety cars and pit windows.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: EN EPL Netbusters 2025/2026 | E37
programme.desc: Highlights of the Premier League Matchweek from an alternative angle. A look back at every goal from every game using the best ISOs and Slow Motion angles.

programme.title: Lens vs Nice - Coupe de France Final's 2025
programme.desc: Live and exclusive only on beIN, the Coupe de France, also referred to as the French Cup, is the premier knockout cup competition in French football organised by the French Football Federation (FF). The winner qualifies for the group stage of the UEFA Europa League and a place in the Trophée des Champions. Current champions are Paris saint Germain.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Real Betis - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 37

programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Buenos Aires P1
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: Peñarol (URU) vs Santa Fe (COL) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage - MD6
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: World Cup 2026 Amazing Facts - Group B (#2)
programme.desc: What are the most amazing facts for the Group B for the next World Cup 2026

programme.title: Chelsea vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Chelsea have won 38 Premier League games against Tottenham. It’s the most they’ve beaten an opponent in the competition, while Spurs have only lost more against Manchester United. Spurs have won just one of their last 35 away league games against Chelsea, a 3-1 win in April 2018 under Mauricio Pochettino.

programme.title: EPL Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each EPL Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Paris FC , The Kombouare’s effect
programme.desc: Antoine Kombouare became the new coach of Paris FC and he changed the approach of his team. What is his methodology ?

programme.title: Roland Garros 2026 Preview - EP1
programme.desc: VAs the red clay of Paris prepares to take center stage, the 2026 edition of Roland-Garros promises a seismic shift in the tennis landscape. This year’s preview show explores the end of eras, the rise of a new "Big Three," and the high-tech innovations transforming the most grueling test in sport

programme.title: Zamalek SC (EGY) vs USMA (ALG) - CAF Confederation Cup 2025/26 - Finals
programme.desc: The CAF Confederation Cup is the second-tier competition of African club football, ranking below the CAF Champions League. Both competitions are live and exclusive only on beIN. Current champions re RS Berkane from Morocco.

programme.title: Mamelodi Sundowns (RSA) vs FAR Rabat (MAR) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - Final
programme.desc: The CAF Champions League, is an annual club football competition organized by the Confederation of African Football (CAF) and contested by top-division African clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in African football and is live and exclusive only on beIN. The current champions are Pyramids Football Club from Egypt.

programme.title: Al Nassr (KSA) - Gamba Osaka (JPN) - AFC Champions League Two 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. programme.desc: This match will be the fifth meeting between Paris FC and Paris Saint-Germain in all competitions, with both sides having won one and drawn two of their previous four encounters. programme.title: Arsenal vs Burnley - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Arsenal have lost just one of their 19 Premier League games against Burnley, going down 1-0 at home in December 2020. Burnley have never scored more than once in 19 Premier League meetings with Arsenal, the most one side has faced any other without netting twice in a match in the competition.

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs Manchester City - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Bournemouth have lost 16 of their 17 Premier League games against Manchester City, though the exception was a 2-1 win in this exact fixture last season. Manchester City’s 94.1% win rate against Bournemouth is the highest of any side against another in Premier League history.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Chelsea have won 38 Premier League games against Tottenham. It’s the most they’ve beaten an opponent in the competition, while Spurs have only lost more against Manchester United. Spurs have won just one of their last 35 away league games against Chelsea, a 3-1 win in April 2018 under Mauricio Pochettino.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last eight Premier League games against Crystal Palace since a 2-0 home loss in October 2021. Crystal Palace have scored exactly twice in each of their last four Premier League away games against Man City, though have only gone on to win one of those. The only visiting team to score 2+ goals in five in a row a

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bournemouth have lost 16 of their 17 Premier League games against Manchester City, though the exception was a 2-1 win in this exact fixture last season. Manchester City’s 94.1% win rate against Bournemouth is the highest of any side against another in Premier League history.

programme.title: Arsenal vs. Burnley - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Arsenal have lost just one of their 19 Premier League games against Burnley, going down 1-0 at home in December 2020. Burnley have never scored more than once in 19 Premier League meetings with Arsenal, the most one side has faced any other without netting twice in a match in the competition.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Manchester United are winless in their last four Premier League games against Nottingham Forest, having won eight in a row against them before this. Nottingham Forest won this exact fixture 3-2 last season – only once have they won consecutive away league games against Manchester United, doing so under Brian Clough in September 1990/April 1992.

programme.title: Brentford vs Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Brentford are unbeaten in their last six home league games against Crystal Palace since a 3-0 loss in the Third Division South in December 1957. Following their 2-0 win in November, Crystal Palace are looking to complete the league double over Brentford for the first time since 1957-58 when they beat them on Christmas Day and Boxing Day.

programme.title: Iran vs United States - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage

programme.desc: This is just the third meeting between Tunisia and Australia in all competitions – Australia won 3-0 in a friendly in October 1997, before Tunisia won 2-0 at the 2005 Confederations Cup. Australia are facing African opposition at the FIFA World Cup for just the second time – they drew 1-1 with Ghana in 2010 in the other.

programme.title: Poland vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is Poland’s first meeting with Saudi Arabia since March 2006 in a friendly, with Poland winning 2-1 thanks to a brace from Lukasz Sosin. This is just Poland’s third FIFA World Cup game against an Asian nation, losing 2-0 to Korea Republic in 2002, and beating Japan 1-0 in 2018.

All 64 games are repeated on exactly the same day at exactly the same times offering viewers the chance to experience once more the greatest FIFA World Cup of all time.

programme.title: Argentina vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 1
programme.desc: This is the third World Cup meeting between Argentina and Croatia, and first in the knockout stages. Argentina won 1-0 in 1998, before Croatia's 3-0 win in the 2018 edition in Russia. Argentina are looking to reach the World Cup final for the sixth time, a figure bettered only by Germany. They've never been eliminated at the semi-final stage before

programme.title: France vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 2
programme.desc: France have never lost against Morocco, with all five of their previous meetings coming in friendlies. The most recent encounter was a 2-2 draw in Saint-Denis in November 2007. France have alternated between victory and defeat in their six World Cup meetings with African nations, losing 1-0 against Tunisia last time out in this year's group stage.

programme.title: Croatia vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 3rd Place
programme.desc: This is the second meeting between Croatia and Morocco at this World Cup, having played out a 0-0 draw on MD1. Croatia were restricted to five shots, their fewest ever in a World Cup match. Croatia have kept a clean sheet in all three of their previous World Cup matches against African sides, beating Cameroon 4-0 in 2014, Nigeria 2-0 in 2018, and d

programme.title: Argentina vs France - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Final
programme.desc: Argentina are competing in their sixth World Cup final, with only Germany participating in more. They're looking to win the trophy for a third time along with 1978 and 1986, but defeat would see them with the joint-most World Cup final losses in history.
